source_generation.mode: Codex built-in image_gen + local chroma-key alpha cleanup

canvas.target_bounds: visible alpha stays within the 1024x1024 canvas; no edge contact

selected.title: Completion stamp one-shot reward
selected.summary: A polished 2.5D workbench completion stamp with three check tokens; pops in, releases restrained sparkles, and fades out so it does not cover the play canvas for long.
selected.end_behavior: fades to transparent; remove overlay after playback

quality_checks: 12 numbered frames are 1024x1024 RGBA transparent PNG.
First and last frames are transparent so the reward can enter and leave cleanly.
Static fallback is provided for environments that cannot play the one-shot animation.
Preview GIF and contact sheet composite the transparent frames on a dark navy canvas.
No text, watermark, external brand, rocket, basket, treasure chest, dog, or emoji-style placeholder is introduced.
